candidate_ss_wr_desc: Introduce the number line and practice counting up to ten and backwords from ten, comparing the amounts of groups of objects on the number line.

small_step_id: Year 1_5-6_Autumn__Place value within 10_3_Count objects from a larger group
candidate_ss_wr_desc: Practise counting with objects by counting a specific number of objects from a larger group, for example take 5 blocks from a group of more than 5

small_step_id: Year 1_5-6_Autumn__Place value within 10_3_Count objects from a larger group
candidate_ss_wr_desc: Children should count a specific number of objects from a larger group, requiring careful organization. They must recall the final count when asked "How many?". To aid understanding, have them count objects onto a mat or into a container, before introducing pictorial representations.
